item.description:
Location: UAE
Description:

Experienced Electronic Technicians are sought for roles involving the installation, commissioning, maintenance, and repair of marine electronics, control, and automation systems on offshore marine construction vessels. The position requires hands-on experience with marine communication, navigation, and entertainment systems, PLC-based control systems, and various industrial electronic equipment. A Diploma in Electronics Engineering and a minimum of two years of relevant experience are necessary.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electronic Technician Job on Offshore Construction Vessels at Libra International Services

item.description:
Location: UAE
Description:

Experienced Electronics Technicians are sought for roles involving the installation, commissioning, maintenance, and repair of marine electronics, control, and automation systems on offshore marine construction vessels. The position requires a Diploma in Electronics Engineering and a minimum of 2 years of relevant experience, with a focus on marine communication, navigation, and automation systems.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electronics Technician Job on Offshore Construction Vessels at Libra International Services

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A skilled Electro-Technical Officer (ETO) is sought to maintain and repair navigation and communication systems across a fleet. Responsibilities include troubleshooting bridge equipment, managing external contractors for repairs and installations, and ensuring compliance with international maritime regulations. Candidates require an ETO CoC (STCW III/6), GMDSS certificate, valid STCW BST, seafarer medical, and 3-5 years of experience with marine electronics and bridge systems.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] ETO Job - Navigation Communication Systems at L.T.T Coastal & Marine Services Ltd

item.description:
Location: UAE
Description:

An Electrical Technician (Support) is sought for an offshore oil and gas project in the UAE. This contract hire position requires a minimum of 5 years of relevant experience in the Oil & Gas industry, with UAE offshore experience being mandatory. Candidates should possess an ITI or Diploma in Electrical or a relevant discipline. Benefits include a salary of AED 3,500 per month, provided air tickets, medical insurance, food, and accommodation. The leave rotation is 150 days on and 30 days off.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electrical Technician Job - Offshore UAE at Oil & Gas | FPSO & Offshore Jobs

item.description:
Location: Africa
Description:

A General Cargo vessel requires an Electrical Officer to join on 24.07.2026. The vessel operates in the Africa region. Key requirements include relevant certifications and experience for the role.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electrical Officer Job - General Cargo Vessel at hatshipping.com

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Assistant Electrician position is available on a cruise vessel. This role offers a career of growth, opportunity, and adventure within the cruise, ferry, and yacht industry. Key requirements and joining details will be provided upon application.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Assistant Electrician Job on Cruise Ship at V.Ships Leisure Recruitment

item.description:
Location: UAE
Description:

Multiple positions are available for offshore operations in the UAE, including Chargehand Mechanic, Marine Mechanic, Oiler, Marine Electrician, Machinist, Senior Electronics Technician, and AC Mechanic. Mandatory experience required is in Offshore Barge, Offshore Production, or Marine Vessels, with a minimum of 3-5 years of Gulf experience in similar roles. The contract rotation is 150 days on and 43 days off. Benefits include free food, accommodation, and transportation, along with an attractive salary and overtime pay.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Mechanic Electrician Jobs - UAE at Libra International Services

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Electrician/ETO is needed to maintain and repair all electrical equipment and systems onboard.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electrician/ETO Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Electrical Engineer is sought for a container vessel, with a joining date of 19.07.2026 for a 3-month contract. Responsibilities include maintenance and repair of electrical equipment, administration of planned maintenance, and ensuring compliance with safety procedures. Candidates should be certified, fluent in English, and possess experience in electrical/electronic fields, with a preference for 3 years on short sea vessels. Knowledge of PLC and fault finding is beneficial.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electrical Engineer Job on Container Vessel at Nordvegr Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An electrician is sought for a container vessel. The joining date is July 15, 2026, with a contract duration of 4 months. The monthly salary offered is USD 6000. The vessel is flagged in Singapore and has a DWT of 8210 tons and GT of 7545 reg. tons. The main engine is a MAK 8M43 with a power of 7200 kW.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electrician Job on Container Vessel at Nordvegr Ltd
